Work & Case Studies

Selected projects in Amazon PPC, product launch, and marketplace growth.

  • Supplement

    Omega 3 Product Launch

    High ACOS and low organic visibility in a competitive supplement category.

    Strategy

    Structured product launch with phased PPC (awareness → consideration → conversion), listing optimization, and search term harvesting.

    Results

    • ACOS:65% → 28%
    • Revenue:2.5x in 6 months
    • Organic share:Significant improvement
    Read full case study
  • Supplement

    Maca Root Campaign

    Scale revenue without blowing ACOS in a niche category.

    Strategy

    Keyword expansion, negative keyword refinement, and bid strategy aligned with TACoS targets.

    Results

    • Revenue:3.2x in 4 months
    • TACoS:Reduced by 22%
    • Conversion:Improved CVR
    Read full case study
  • Supplement

    Supplement Category Growth

    Improve overall advertising efficiency across a brand portfolio.

    Strategy

    Portfolio-level TACoS targeting, campaign restructuring, and listing optimization across SKUs.

    Results

    • TACoS:Improved by 35%
    • ACOS:Stable while scaling
    • Market share:Category share gain
    Read full case study
